brief_justification: Arrives at exact correct answer (B) with valid hop-by-hop trace matching ground truth; goes one level beyond surface by systematically checking each hop against directional rules rather than just asserting the answer; proceeds entirely linearly with no reflection on own reasoning method or potential misreadings of the policy spec; lists steps but applies no counterfactual test (e.g., 'what if prod could send?') or boundary check; states all conclusions as definitive with no acknowledgment that policy interpretation could vary or that bidirectionality assumptions were made; implicitly shows why (C) and (D) fail through the trace but never explicitly addresses or rejects competing options; every conclusion traces directly to a stated policy rule and a third party could fully reproduce the chain.
